allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(doc['v']\) for doc in d['response']['docs'] if doc['v'].startswith\('2.2.'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vs=[doc['v'] for doc in d['response']['docs']]; print\('total:', len\(vs\)\); [print\(v\) for v in vs if v.startswith\('2.2.'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vs=[doc['v'] for doc in d['response']['docs']]; print\(vs[:20]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vs=[doc['v'] for doc in d['response']['docs']]; print\('total:', len\(vs\)\); print\('first 20:', vs[:20]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(v.get\('version'\)\) for v in d.get\('components', []\)]")
